mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO friend (user_id, friend_id, remark, is_starred) VALUES (#{userId}, #{friendId}, #{remark}, #{isStarred})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM friend WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM friend WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId}
mapper.update: UPDATE friend SET is_starred = #{isStarred} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId}
UPDATE friend SET remark = #{remark} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM friend WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id IN #{fid}
